requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series for PV Inverters — Georgia GEOSTM / GNERC Framework
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——格鲁吉亚GEOSTM / GNERC框架
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——喬治亞GEOSTM / GNERC框架

summary.en: Georgia's standards body, GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology), adopts IEC and EN standards as Georgian national standards under its DCFTA EU-alignment programme. The applicable EMC standards for solar PV inverters in Georgia are: (1) IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) — the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment; (2) IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase); (3) IEC 61000-series conducted and radiated emission and immunity standards as applicable to the inverter power rating and installation environment. No standalone GEOSTM-specific EMC Technical Regulation exclusively for solar inverters has been identified as of the last verification date; EMC requirements for Georgia PV inverters are expected to be embedded in applicable IEC/EN product standards adopted by GEOSTM and in GNERC/GSE grid-connection technical conditions. Georgia's DCFTA alignment is ongoing — EMC regulatory requirements may tighten as EU technical regulations are progressively adopted.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚标准化机构GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准和计量局）在其DCFTA欧盟对接计划下将IEC和EN标准采纳为格鲁吉亚国家标准。格鲁吉亚太阳能光伏逆变器适用的EMC标准包括：（1）IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）——光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准；（2）IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备谐波电流排放限值）；（3）适用于逆变器功率等级和安装环境的IEC 61000系列传导和辐射排放及抗扰度标准。截至最后核验日期，尚未发现专门针对太阳能逆变器的独立GEOSTM EMC技术法规；格鲁吉亚光伏逆变器的EMC要求预期包含在GEOSTM采纳的适用IEC/EN产品标准及GNERC/GSE并网技术条件中。格鲁吉亚DCFTA对接持续推进——随着欧盟技术法规逐步被采纳，EMC监管要求可能进一步收紧。
summary.zht: 喬治亞標準化機構GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準和計量局）在其DCFTA歐盟對接計畫下將IEC和EN標準採納為喬治亞國家標準。喬治亞太陽能光伏逆變器適用的EMC標準包括：（1）IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）——光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準；（2）IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備諧波電流排放限值）；（3）適用於逆變器功率等級和安裝環境的IEC 61000系列傳導和輻射排放及抗擾度標準。截至最後核驗日期，尚未發現專門針對太陽能逆變器的獨立GEOSTM EMC技術法規；喬治亞光伏逆變器的EMC要求預期包含在GEOSTM採納的適用IEC/EN產品標準及GNERC/GSE併網技術條件中。喬治亞DCFTA對接持續推進——隨著歐盟技術法規逐步被採納，EMC監管要求可能進一步收緊。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (adopted by GEOSTM under IEC/EN alignment)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-series — Electromagnetic compatibility standards (conducted/radiated emissions and immunity) as applicable to inverter power class and installation
GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) — IEC/EN standards adoption under DCFTA

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 and GB/T 37408 both draw on IEC 61000-series test methods, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope, referenced limits, and test conditions are not harmonised with IEC 62920 as adopted by GEOSTM. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Georgia GEOSTM conformity assessment or GNERC/GSE grid-connection technical submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920和GB/T 37408都借鉴了IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408的EMC测试范围、引用限值和测试条件未与GEOSTM采纳的IEC 62920协调。仅基于GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为格鲁吉亚GEOSTM合格评定或GNERC/GSE并网技术提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920和GB/T 37408都借鑑了IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408的EMC測試範圍、引用限值和測試條件未與GEOSTM採納的IEC 62920協調。僅基於GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為喬治亞GEOSTM合格評定或GNERC/GSE併網技術提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy Georgia GEOSTM IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Georgia and China share the same nominal grid voltage (220/380 V at 50 Hz), so voltage-related retesting may not be required — however, confirm with the GNERC/GSE technical reviewer or GEOSTM conformity assessment body whether test conditions used are acceptable. Verify whether GEOSTM has published a specific conformity assessment procedure referencing IEC 62920 for PV inverters, as the Georgian regulatory framework is actively evolving under DCFTA.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足格鲁吉亚GEOSTM的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。格鲁吉亚和中国名义电网电压相同（50 Hz 220/380 V），因此可能无需进行与电压相关的重新测试——但应向GNERC/GSE技术审核人员或GEOSTM合格评定机构确认所用测试条件是否可被接受。请核实GEOSTM是否已针对光伏逆变器发布引用IEC 62920的特定合格评定程序，因为格鲁吉亚监管框架在DCFTA框架下仍在持续演进。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足喬治亞GEOSTM的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。喬治亞和中國名義電網電壓相同（50 Hz 220/380 V），因此可能無需進行與電壓相關的重新測試——但應向GNERC/GSE技術審核人員或GEOSTM合格評定機構確認所用測試條件是否可被接受。請核實GEOSTM是否已針對光伏逆變器發佈引用IEC 62920的特定合格評定程序，因為喬治亞監管框架在DCFTA框架下仍在持續演進。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory under GEOSTM IEC/EN alignment for conformity assessment of PV inverters; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 are the applicable EMC standards — verify current GEOSTM conformity assessment scope directly with GEOSTM
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Georgia GEOSTM IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before GEOSTM conformity assessment or GNERC/GSE grid-connection submission. Confirm with GEOSTM whether Georgia grid voltage conditions (220/380 V) are consistent with the test conditions used — and verify the current GEOSTM conformity assessment procedure for PV inverters directly at geostm.gov.ge.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足格鲁吉亚GEOSTM的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在进行GEOSTM合格评定或GNERC/GSE并网提交前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请向GEOSTM确认格鲁吉亚电网电压条件（220/380 V）是否与所用测试条件一致，并直接在geostm.gov.ge核实光伏逆变器的现行GEOSTM合格评定程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足喬治亞GEOSTM的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在進行GEOSTM合格評定或GNERC/GSE併網提交前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請向GEOSTM確認喬治亞電網電壓條件（220/380 V）是否與所用測試條件一致，並直接在geostm.gov.ge核實光伏逆變器的現行GEOSTM合格評定程序。
